'''Tranira Trell''' was the mother of [[Vimran Trell]]. When the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] invaded their homeworld, [[Yutusk]], Tranira and her husband, [[Francill Trell|Francill]] were executed as suspected [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] sympathizers. Their [[Death/Legends|deaths]] ensured that Vimran used his position as chef on the [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Liberator (Imperial I-class)|''Adjudicator'']] to secretly pass information to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].
